description: Rise of Avalon Patch 3 (3 September 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Silence Changes, Other Changes (Roads of Avalon chests, Tome of Insight drop rates), Combat Balance Changes (Daggers, Helmets), Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes
items: Increased the chance that a Corrupted Dungeon chest will be a loot chest rather than a book chest
Resolved an issue that caused all Corrupted Dungeon hidden treasures to spawn at Tier 6; their levels and rewards now match the tier of their chosen difficulty
Resolved an issue that caused hidden treasures with loot to spawn less often than those with Tomes of Insight
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon chest loot book Tier 6 hidden treasures difficulty Tomes of Insight spawn

sections.heading: Silence Changes
sections.description: Players can now enter Corrupted Dungeons while under the effect of a Portal Shrine debuff. This also allows spells usually permitted while silenced (like Cleanse or Iceblock), though doing so will remove invisibility but not silence.
sections.searchable_text: Silence Changes Corrupted Dungeons Portal Shrine debuff Cleanse Iceblock invisibility silence

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Opened chests in the Roads of Avalon now last much longer before disappearing, to adjust for cases where looting was delayed due to combat
Tome of Insight global drop rate adjusted in Hellgates, Roads of Avalon, Treasure Sites, and Castles / Castle Outposts, as various Rise of Avalon features created new sources for these items
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Roads of Avalon chests loot combat Tome of Insight drop rate Hellgates Treasure Sites Castles Castle Outposts Rise of Avalon

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Daggers Shadow Edge Helmets Sacrifice Graveguard

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Sacrifice Graveguard Helmet players mobs

changes.raw_text: Sacrifice (Graveguard Helmet): Can now only be cast on players and not on mobs
notes: Can now only be cast on players and not on mobs

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Soul Link now stays on the target selected with the first cast as intended
Fixed an issue where the killing blow of Vampiric Strike would not grant health
Targets can now be hit by multiple Haunting Scream areas at once, as intended
Vengeful Sprint can now be canceled by Cripple as intended
Fixed season info on season winner statue in Lymhurst Conquerors' Hall
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Soul Link Vampiric Strike Haunting Scream Vengeful Sprint Cripple Lymhurst Conquerors Hall season statue graphical animation terrain localization
